name: Cheesy Chicken with Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Make a deep slit in the side of each chicken breast to form a pocket. Place a slice of cheese in each pocket.
3. Put the chicken in a shallow ovenproof dish.
4. Mix together cream and half the mustard. Pour around the base of the chicken.
5. Melt butter and season with salt, pepper, and chopped tarragon. Add remaining mustard. Brush onto the exposed parts of the chicken.
6. Bake for 40 minutes until golden. Serve with ground pink peppercorns.
